titleStmt.title: SII 40.47: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 47. (A.R. No. B. 26 of 1930.) Pulipāḍu, Palnad Taluk, Guntur District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a pillar set up in front of the Vēṇugōpalasvami temple.
This is dated Śaka 1209, Sarvajit, Phālguṇa śu. 8, Thursday, corresponding to 1288 A.D., February 11. However the weekday was Wednesday.

Records the construction of the prākara, maṇḍapa, gōpura, the compound wall (Kōṭa) and instalation of Garuḍagaṁbha in the temple of Gōpinātha by Nalla-Gōpāladāsa, who calls himself a dependent of Śri-Modaliṅgāru of the family of Vira-Nārāyaṇadāsa, for the merit of the king. Further it records the gift of land, tolls and oil-mill by Dāḍi Rudradēva, the son of the king for burning perpetual lamps in the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
jayaṁtti jayada jñānatamathaska
ra bhāskara śrīrāmānupadāṁbbē(bbhō)
jēbhūṣaṇaḥ puruṣōttamaḥ
svasti sakala lōkapāla cakra cū
ḍāmaṇi . mayūkhaśēkharita ca
raṇāraviṁda . makaraṁda dhārā
yamāṇa . maṁdākini purapū
ta bhuvana bhavana . mūlastaṁbbā
yuta . catu¨rbhbhuja madhya siddhāṁtta
varuddha . lakṣmī vilāsa maṇi yadu
nakaṁstubhastabhakitabhasti vistāra
vihita bālātapa prasaraṇa bisa
rasiruhaga¨rbhbhavāsaga¨rbhbhēśvara hi
raṇyaga¨rbhbhagēyyamāna dānada ca
krava¨rtti madhukaiṭabhakaṁ sārihi
ṁsāpadāna māniyyaśoṁ¨rgaśaṁkha ca
kra śātapa citritakarakamala kamanīya
divyamū¨rtti yavanita bhaktajana lā
ṁcita kalpatarūrānaṁda mūlaka
damaraviṁdadaḷayitalōcanuṁḍai
na . pulipāṭi śrī ceṁnagōpinadhaniki
svasti śrī śakavaruṣaṁbulu 1209
Agunēṁṭi sa¨rvvajittu saṁvatsara phālgu
ṇa śu 8 guruvāramunāṁḍu pu
lipāṭi kōṟabōladēviraḍḍi ma
numaṁḍḍu nallamāṟeḍi koḍuku
svasti śrī cakrakolavijaya cūḍāma
ṇi vēdamā¨rga pratiṣṭhācā¨ryya
śrīmahādēvi ce¨rla ceṁnakēśavape
rumāṁḍla divya śrīpādapadmārādhaka
Ājñasiṁhāsana niratulaina
śrīvīranārāyaṇa dāsula va
ṁśoddakulaina śrīmōdaliṁgāri śrīpā
dā śrītulaina gōpāḷadāsulu
svasti śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalēśvara kākati
yya rudradēva mahārājulaku dha
¨rmmātamugā jēsina śrīkā¨ryyamu
śrī gōpināthani tirumuṭṭamunu
tirumaṁḍḍapamu gopuramunu kōṭanu ga
ruḍa gaṁbhamū saitamugānu Ācaṁdrā
¨rkamugāṁ jēsenu svasti śrī manmahāmaṁḍa
lēśvara kākatiyya rudradēva mahārājula
koḍuku dāḍirudradēvuḍu śrī gōpināthani
Amudupaḍi svagrāmāna kha 4 na 10 telu
kuṭlu na 10 daiyedana 5 gōraguridālana 10
Āṁdanīru nēla . drappi ce¨rla nīru nela .
ce¨rllōni guḍipāṭanu na 5 Atukūra
na 5 svagrāmāna dīpālaku buṟa suṁka
munu māḍavīsālu viḍenakugānuvu Ā
caṁdrā¨rkamugā dīpālaku yicitimi nālugu
puṭlunu
Digital edition of SII 40.47 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
